mapper.sql:
select record_id as feedbackId, 'prep' as feedbackType, mentor_name as mentorName, student_name as studentName, case class_status when 'mock_interview' then '模拟面试' when 'case_prep' then 'Case Study' when 'resume_revision' then '简历修改' when 'behavioral' then '行为面试' when 'written_test' then '笔试辅导' else '岗位辅导' end as courseLabel, case when cast(coalesce(nullif(rate, ''), '0') as decimal(10, 2)) >= 4.5 then '优秀' when cast(coalesce(nullif(rate, ''), '0') as decimal(10, 2)) >= 4.0 then '良好' when cast(coalesce(nullif(rate, ''), '0') as decimal(10, 2)) >= 3.0 then '一般' else '需改进' end as performanceLabel, case course_source when 'mentor' then '导师端' when 'assistant' then '助教端' else '班主任端' end as sourceLabel, date_format(coalesce(class_date, submitted_at), '%Y-%m-%d') as feedbackDate, date_format(coalesce(update_time, submitted_at, class_date), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as updatedAt, null as emailQuality, null as etiquetteScore, null as callQuality, null as recommendedLabel, null as score, null as assessmentTopic from osg_class_record where feedback_content is not null and feedback_content != '' and coalesce(class_status, '') not in ('networking_midterm', 'mock_midterm')
union all
select record_id as feedbackId, 'networking' as feedbackType, mentor_name as mentorName, student_name as studentName, '人际关系期中' as courseLabel, null as performanceLabel, case course_source when 'mentor' then '导师端' when 'assistant' then '助教端' else '班主任端' end as sourceLabel, date_format(coalesce(class_date, submitted_at), '%Y-%m-%d') as feedbackDate, date_format(coalesce(update_time, submitted_at, class_date), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as updatedAt, least(5, greatest(1, round(cast(coalesce(nullif(rate, ''), '3') as decimal(10, 2))))) as emailQuality, least(5, greatest(1, round(cast(coalesce(nullif(rate, ''), '3') as decimal(10, 2))))) as etiquetteScore, least(10, greatest(2, round(cast(coalesce(nullif(rate, ''), '3') as decimal(10, 2)) * 2))) as callQuality, case when cast(coalesce(nullif(rate, ''), '0') as decimal(10, 2)) >= 4.0 then '是' else '待定' end as recommendedLabel, null as score, null as assessmentTopic from osg_class_record where feedback_content is not null and feedback_content != '' and class_status = 'networking_midterm'
union all
select record_id as feedbackId, 'mock_midterm' as feedbackType, mentor_name as mentorName, student_name as studentName, '模拟期中考试' as courseLabel, case when cast(coalesce(nullif(rate, ''), '0') as decimal(10, 2)) >= 4.5 then '优秀' when cast(coalesce(nullif(rate, ''), '0') as decimal(10, 2)) >= 4.0 then '良好' when cast(coalesce(nullif(rate, ''), '0') as decimal(10, 2)) >= 3.0 then '一般' else '需改进' end as performanceLabel, case course_source when 'mentor' then '导师端' when 'assistant' then '助教端' else '班主任端' end as sourceLabel, date_format(coalesce(class_date, submitted_at), '%Y-%m-%d') as feedbackDate, date_format(coalesce(update_time, submitted_at, class_date), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as updatedAt, null as emailQuality, null as etiquetteScore, null as callQuality, null as recommendedLabel, least(100, greatest(0, round(cast(coalesce(nullif(rate, ''), '0') as decimal(10, 2)) * 20))) as score, coalesce(nullif(topics, ''), '未填写') as assessmentTopic from osg_class_record where feedback_content is not null and feedback_content != '' and class_status = 'mock_midterm'
mapper.select:
select count(*) as totalCount, sum(case when feedbackType = 'prep' then 1 else 0 end) as prepCount, sum(case when feedbackType = 'networking' then 1 else 0 end) as networkingCount, sum(case when feedbackType = 'mock_midterm' then 1 else 0 end) as mockMidtermCount from (
) feedback
